concerns.text: Phase 7 (Cellular Automata) introduces User Story 5 and tasks T045-T054, but the spec.md (FR-001, US-1) strictly limits scope to 'canonical chaotic systems like the Lorenz attractor' (Lorenz/Rössler). There is no FR/SC in spec.md covering Cellular Automata, making these tasks unanchored to any requirement. This is unapproved scope creep.

Task T031 ('Identify Critical Threshold') is marked as unchecked/missing implementation details in the provided text (or implied as incomplete/rejected in the analyze report context). It is the sole task for FR-008 ('identify critical SNR threshold') and SC-003. Without a valid, executable task producing this logic, these requirements have zero coverage.

Tasks T037 and T038 (timing logic and final results export) are marked as unchecked/missing. They are required to satisfy FR-010 (pipeline runtime < 2 hours) and SC-005 (runtime measurement). Without these tasks, the spec's performance constraint and success criterion are unimplemented.

Tasks T045-T054 reference 'Cellular Automata' and 'CA-to-continuous mapping' (T048), but spec.md Key Entities only define 'ChaoticTrajectory' and 'NoisyTrajectory' for continuous systems. There is no spec-defined entity for CA trajectories, making the data model for these tasks unaligned with the specification (stale/unreferenced scope).
